overall.description: A player character walks through a heavy snowstorm in a mountainous winter landscape, discovering a remote wooden cabin and then a grave site with an open coffin containing a skeleton. The footage is from a high-quality video game, likely Red Dead Redemption 2, featuring cinematic snow effects and atmospheric fog.

steep snow-covered mountain rising on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow, foggy mountain pass blanketed in deep snow. The camera moves forward through the snow, passing large rocks and dead trees while heavy snowfall reduces visibility. The atmosphere is desolate and cold, with rocky slopes visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching isolated wooden cabin in snowy mountain clearing

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues through the snow, a wooden cabin emerges from the fog ahead. The character approaches the cabin, passing it on the left side. The dead trees fall behind as the scene opens into a slightly wider area around the cabin structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountainside with scattered rocks leading to grave site

segments.scene_description: Moving past the cabin into open terrain, the camera approaches a grave site marked by a wooden tombstone and a coffin surrounded by stones. The fog persists but the sky becomes partially visible as the character walks toward the burial site.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered grave site with open coffin containing skeleton

events.description: character stops walking and enters first-person interaction mode at the grave
player opens the coffin lid revealing a skeleton inside holding a rosary
player opens journal to sketch the grave site and coffin

agents.ego_description: opening the coffin to inspect the corpse, examining the skeleton and rosary, then sketching the scene in a journal

entered.detail: skeleton in tattered clothing holding prayer beads inside the open coffin
open sketchbook with pencil drawing of the grave site

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at the grave and shifts to first-person perspective. The player opens the coffin to reveal a skeleton clutching prayer beads, with a wooden tombstone bearing red text nearby. The player then opens a journal to sketch the scene, with game UI prompts visible for inspecting and burying.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a desolate, snow-covered mountain pass that culminates in the discovery of a grim burial site. It begins by pushing through a narrow, foggy corridor of deep snow, passing jagged rocks and dead trees under a heavy snowfall that obscures the horizon. As the camera advances, a lone wooden cabin emerges from the mist, and the terrain opens up as the character passes the structure on its left side. The scene then shifts toward an open clearing where a grave marked by a wooden tombstone and a stone-ringed coffin becomes visible through the persisting fog. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the burial site, opening the coffin to reveal a skeleton clutching prayer beads before a journal appears to sketch the scene.
